title: The Deeper Mirror

features.name: fractured reflection pool
features.desc-on-touch: you look at your image and it looks back at many angles at once. the surface holds more depths than the water below it.

features.name: recursive prism array
features.desc-on-touch: light enters one prism and exits seventeen others. the corruption loves geometry that refuses to stay simple.

features.name: inverted ceiling mirror
features.desc-on-touch: above and below have swapped meanings. what you see overhead is your own signal returning, delayed by one frame.

features.name: symmetry break shimmer
features.desc-on-touch: something was perfectly mirrored here once. now it remembers both what it was and what it couldn't be.

features.name: refraction cascade
features.desc-on-touch: each beam bends into the next. the chamber teaches light what it means to change direction and stay itself.

features.name: doubled edge
features.desc-on-touch: the chamber wall doubles back on itself. it marks the place where inside becomes outside without crossing a boundary.

inscription: surface and reflection have traded places. you are not sure which one you are.

file.name: Mirror_Recursion_Depth_Analysis.txt
file.note: checksum: emotionally valid / formally unstable — how many layers of reflection can a surface hold before it becomes aware of its own edges?

exits.label: back up through refraction to the parent chamber
downward where the mirroring stops and something else begins to know itself
toward a break in the symmetry, where one half of the mirror learned to act alone
back to where reflection was still learning to be recursive
